plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for RAD access, CPE, industrial router and broadband wireless devices under the RAD Data Communications private MIB tree. The current facts confirm RAD Data Communications enterprise PEN 164 and public access-device product scope, but no reliable row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — RAD access, CPE, industrial router and broadband wireless devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access
